name: Volatility Risk Premium Effect
author: QuantConnect
description: Sells an ATM straddle (one ATM call + one ATM put) and buys a 15% OTM put as insurance each month on a liquid equity index. Harvests the persistent spread between implied and realized volatility (volatility risk premium).

name: Momentum and Reversal Combined with Volatility Effect in Stocks
author: QuantConnect
description: Long-short equity strategy that filters stocks to the top-20% by realized volatility then goes long the top momentum quintile and short the bottom momentum quintile (6-month formation, 1-month holding). Large-cap only. Based on Cao & Han (2016).

name: ETF Dual Momentum Rotation (Antonacci GEM)
author: QuantConnect Community (Antonacci 2014)
description: Monthly rotation between SPY, EFA, and AGG using Gary Antonacci's Global Equities Momentum (GEM). Combines relative momentum (SPY vs EFA) and absolute momentum (winner vs T-bills) to switch to bonds when equity momentum is negative. Binary single-holding portfolio.
